name: Chatham Racquet Club
description: Chatham Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Savannah, GA. There are 12 outdoor hard and clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, locker rooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: Daffin Park
description: Daffin Park is a place to play pickleball in Bona Bella, GA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Islands Family YMCA
description: Islands Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Savannah, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and locker rooms.

name: Jaycee Park
description: Jaycee Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tybee Island, GA. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Jenkins Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Jenkins Athletic Club in Savannah, GA! The court surface is wood. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

description: Jewish Educational Alliance is a place to play pickleball in Savannah, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Savannah Pickleball Academy
description: Come check out Savannah's premiere indoor pickleball facility! Featuring 6 indoor, air-conditioned hard courts, as well as 2 outdoor, covered courts, the Savannah Pickleball Academy is ready for you!

description: Come play pickleball at Scott Stell Park in Savannah, GA! There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
